nodes.label: AI as structural scaffold for creative projects
nodes.label_negative: AI as generator of creative content
nodes.grounding_span: I am very much driving the creative side. I personally would find use AI to generate the ideas and content rather boring.

nodes.label: AI as productivity accelerator
nodes.grounding_span: I get a lot more done in a shorter amount of time.

nodes.label: AI as ADHD-friendly organizational tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as overwhelming or unhelpful for neurodivergent users
nodes.grounding_span: extremely helpful for someone with ADHD as well as other neurological disorders that make staying on track incredibly difficult.

nodes.label: AI as research resource
nodes.grounding_span: it was not very helpful in recommending good resources for learning more about Thailand and Thai fairy tales.

nodes.label: AI as self-improvement tool for writing weaknesses
nodes.label_negative: AI as irrelevant to personal growth
nodes.grounding_span: AI will help me analyze my weaknesses as an author and work on them over the next few years.
